arts.ttl: Leeds forward tipped to return to Elland Road after difficult loan spell
arts.sum: Sky Sports journalist Dan Bardell has backed Jack Harrison to return to Leeds United. Harrison is once again on loan at Everton this season after spending the 2023/24 campaign at Goodison Park. Pundit claims 24-year-old isn’t good enough to play for Leeds! The winger hasn’t played for Leeds United since the end of the 2022/23 […] The post Leeds forward tipped to return to Elland Road after difficult loan spell appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Luton Town as Daniel Farke overlooks good form for rotation
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has double Leeds United suspension worry to consider tonight
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Luton Town tonight with Daniel Farke having two players in his current squad that are sitting on four yellow cards and one away from suspension. Leeds United: Joe Rodon and Willy Gnonto on suspension tightrope still

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard could do Leeds United a massive favour as he closes in on EFL agreement
arts.sum: Leeds United’s Championship rivals Coventry City are finally closing in on the appointment of Mark Robins’ replacement, with Frank Lampard in advanced talks this week. Coventry look to be finally nearing an appointment to replace Robins in the dugout this week, as The Telegraph report that they are in advanced talks with Frank Lampard over the vacancy.

arts.ttl: Leeds United tipped to lose key first team player in January amid wage bill claims
arts.sum: Leeds United look likely to let Joe Gelhardt leave during the January window, but Carlton Palmer believes another first team star could depart. Carlton Palmer: Junior Firpo could leave Leeds in January

arts.ttl: Leeds United tipped to lose key first team player in January amid wage bill claims

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard set to ignite Leeds United rivalry again after latest Coventry City decision
arts.sum: He writes: "Coventry City plan to name Frank Lampard as boss today - with old pal Joe Edwards set to join him as his number two." "Edwards has been out of work since leaving Millwall but was previously part of Team Lampard at Chelsea and Everton.", reports Coventry Live .

arts.ttl: Leeds United ace makes bold comment including Sheffield United
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Josuha Guilavogui believes that Sheffield United are not a better side than the Whites right now, but Daniel Farke’s men need to prove that with consistency home and away. While the Blades are top despite their two points deducted at the start of the season, Leeds’ free agent signing Josuha Guilavogui doesn’t believe they are an outright better team than the Whites.

arts.ttl: Joe Gelhardt 'wanted' by Rangers as Celtic loan transfer scuppered by red tape
arts.sum: Gers boss Philippe Clement wants to bolster his attacking options after watching his goal-shy side score just 17 times from 12 league games this season. Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community!

arts.ttl: Referee David Coote strongly refutes "false and defamatory allegations" regarding Leeds United game amid betting probe
arts.sum: Referee David Coote strongly refutes what he describes as "false and defamatory allegations" made against him for an incident involving a 2019 fixture between Leeds United and West Bromwich Albion.
